description: Agent-proposed insights and feature suggestions for the Director

insights.message: SFX coverage drift: 7 key game moments (encounter, success, fail, card reveal) play silently
insights.details: Audit found 7 sound names called in UI/3D scripts (encounter_card_overlay, book_cinematic, tutorial_card_layer, broceliande_forest_3d) but not registered in SFXManager. Silent fail at key emotional moments: card reveals, encounter triggers, minigame results. BUG-SFX-MISSING-SOUNDS (P5) will fix. Root cause: new callers added without updating _generate_all_sounds() names array — a coverage drift problem. Suggest: add a static assert or comment at top of SFXManager listing ALL expected sound names so future callers can verify at a glance.

proposed_task.title: Add SFX names table comment header in SFXManager._generate_all_sounds()

insights.message: 192 hardcoded French strings detected across 15 files
insights.details: text_registry.json created with ~80 keys. Remaining ~120 strings in merlin_constants.gd (oghams, biomes, talents, verbs) need migration. Priority: UI strings first, then game data.

proposed_task.title: Migrate remaining 120 strings to text_registry.json

insights.message: No visual test baseline exists — screenshot pipeline ready but untested
insights.details: screenshot_agent.gd and visual_test_runner.py created. Need to run first baseline capture on MerlinGame.tscn and Hub scene to establish reference screenshots.

proposed_task.title: Run first visual test baseline on 3 core scenes

insights.message: Triplanar shaders too heavy for mobile — need LOD fallbacks
insights.details: low_poly.shader uses multiple texture fetches and depth blending. Mobile devices will struggle. Recommend shader variant with single texture + flat shading for QualityLevel.LOW.

proposed_task.title: Create mobile-friendly shader variant for LOW quality

insights.message: dominant_faction biome routing injected but not yet wired into trigger evaluation
insights.details: enriched_run now carries dominant_faction (e.g. 'korrigans' in marais). _evaluate_triggers() does not yet use it — event sub-types with high faction rep for the biome's dominant faction don't get automatic weight bonuses on entry. Adding a trigger condition using enriched_run['dominant_faction'] + enriched_run['factions'][dominant_faction] would make biome entry feel faction-aware without any JSON config change needed.

proposed_task.title: S3-DOMINANT-FACTION-TRIGGER: wire dominant_faction into _evaluate_triggers bonus

insights.message: Faction system fully operational — AI subsystems now receive live rep data for the first time
insights.details: Prior to BUG-FACTIONS-STALE-FIX, all AI orchestration (omniscient, event router, RAG, context builder, LLM adapter) saw faction_rep as zeros for all runs. With fix confirmed, the game now has a complete data pipeline: player choices → effect engine → meta.faction_rep → all 5 AI systems. First time this full loop is functional. High-value test would be a narrative coherence check: do event categories actually change when one faction reaches 70+ reputation?

proposed_task.title: Test narrative coherence with high faction rep (manual or simulated run)

insights.message: run.day always shows 1 — LLM temporal narrative broken
insights.details: run.day is initialized to 1 in store_run.gd but never incremented. Every card the LLM receives shows 'Jour 1, N cartes jouees'. Narrative has no temporal progression — a 50-card run feels like Day 1 forever. S2-DAY-TICK-FIX task created (P8). Recommended: 1 day per 3 cards (configurable CARDS_PER_DAY constant). Also affects build_llm_prompt_context which always renders day as '1'.

proposed_task.title: S2-DAY-TICK-FIX: increment run.day per N cards in resolve_choice()

insights.message: Vestigial gauges_changed signal + MerlinGaugeSystem in merlin_store.gd may be dead code
insights.details: S2-CONTEXT-REGRESSION-TEST SF-001: merlin_store.gd still declares gauges_changed signal (line 23) and emits it via StoreMap.update_gauges (line 434). MerlinGaugeSystem.new().build_default_gauges() is called in dispatch handler. If StoreMap and MerlinGaugeSystem are not used elsewhere, this is dead code that could be removed in S2-DEAD-FILES scope. If map/progression gauges are an intentional separate system (not card-cycle gauges), it is benign.

proposed_task.title: Audit MerlinGaugeSystem + StoreMap — add to S2-DEAD-FILES or keep

insights.message: mg_meditation.gd is a functional script with no dispatch path — pending director placement decision (q-20260413-004)
insights.details: After GAMES['esprit'] aligned to bible s.6.2, mg_meditation no longer dispatched. Script preserved, preload in match block retained. Director must decide: keep as bonus in esprit, move to perception/logique, or add to bible. Task will be created once answered.

proposed_task.title: Add mg_meditation to GAMES field per director q-20260413-004

insights.message: Signal delta accuracy restored: reputation UI will now show correct faction changes
insights.details: BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA-FIX corrected reputation_changed signal. Previously UI listeners received raw requested delta (up to ±20 even if capped). Now they receive the true applied change. This matters for reputation animation smoothness and achievement tracking (e.g., earned +5 rep at cap, not +20).

proposed_task.title: Add reputation cap visual indicator when delta is clamped

insights.message: arc_condition_type field in BIOMES now has 4 distinct types but evaluator only handles 2
insights.details: S2-BIOMES introduced 'runs_in_biome' and 'fins_vues' condition types (landes_bruyere and collines_dolmens arcs). The evaluation code in merlin_skeleton_generator.gd and llm_adapter_map_prompt.gd only handles 'faction_rep' and 'oghams_owned'. Until S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL is implemented, these two biomes will never unlock their arcs regardless of player progress. This is a silent logic bug.

proposed_task.title: Implement arc_condition_type evaluators: runs_in_biome + fins_vues

insights.message: dominant_faction should align with arc_condition_faction across all biomes
insights.details: S2-BIOMES-REGRESSION-TEST found cotes_sauvages.dominant_faction='korrigans' while arc unlock requires Rep Niamh >= 30. When dominant_faction and arc_condition_faction diverge, the LLM context sent before arc-unlock may contradict the arc narrative (routing as korrigans while unlocking via niamh). A single-pass audit of all 8 biomes to verify dominant_faction thematic coherence is recommended.

proposed_task.title: Fix cotes_sauvages.dominant_faction: korrigans → niamh

insights.message: 7 game-flow SFX sounds were silently missing — no crash, but UX degradation at key moments
insights.details: SFXManager.play() returns silently when a name is not registered. This means card reveals, encounter entries, success/fail outcomes, danger warnings, and confirm actions had zero audio feedback. The silent-fail design is intentional for robustness, but it means missing sounds can go undetected indefinitely without static auditing. Consider adding a startup warning log when a registered caller name is not found in names[].

proposed_task.title: SFXManager: warn on unregistered sound at startup (debug mode)

insights.message: Anam death penalty bypassed by in-run ADD_ANAM card effects — design ambiguity needs director decision
insights.details: The bible formula 'Mort = Anam × min(cartes/30, 1.0)' is ambiguous about scope. Currently ADD_ANAM from card effects is credited to meta['anam'] immediately (permanent, no death penalty). Only the base run-end reward (ANAM_BASE_REWARD=10 + bonuses) is scaled by the death ratio. Impact: a player who earns 30 Anam from card choices then dies at card 5 keeps all 30 Anam. If the bible intent is that early-run deaths should yield less total Anam, this needs a fix. If immediate card rewards are intentionally 'confirmed' gains (rewarding smart individual choices regardless of run outcome), no change needed. Director decision requested via q-20260414-001.

proposed_task.title: BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX: scope ADD_ANAM under death ratio

insights.message: Day counter now ticks every 5 cards — consider showing the current day in the LLM prompt and HUD
insights.details: S2-DAY-TICK-FIX implemented run['day'] increment (every CARDS_PER_DAY=5 cards). The day value is already passed via run state to LLM context but the HUD may not display it. Exposing 'Jour N' in the card display header would give players a sense of run progression and align with the narrative 'Jour 1' references in generated text.

proposed_task.title: Display current in-game day in HUD card header

insights.message: meta.biome_run_counts + meta.fins_vues may not be initialized — arc conditions for landes + collines silently fail
insights.details: S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL (P16) will add evaluators for 'runs_in_biome' and 'fins_vues' arc condition types. However, if meta.biome_run_counts (dict) and meta.fins_vues (int) are not initialized in init_meta() and not incremented at run-end, the evaluators will always see zero and arcs will never unlock. The S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL task description must explicitly include: (1) init_meta() field initialization, (2) apply_run_rewards() increment logic. T-S2-ARC-EVAL-TEST (P19) will catch this if missed.

proposed_task.title: Ensure meta.biome_run_counts + meta.fins_vues are initialized and incremented in apply_run_rewards()

insights.message: Anam accumulation during run bypasses death penalty — pending director decision
insights.details: ADD_ANAM card effects currently credit meta['anam'] immediately during the run, bypassing the death ratio min(cards/30, 1.0). Bible s.5.1 implies all run anam should be scaled at death. Director question q-20260414-001 is pending. Once answered, BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX (P10) should be unblocked. If director chooses option A (immediate gain), the current behavior is correct. If option B or C, _apply_add_anam() must write to run['anam_accumulated'] and NOT meta['anam'] during the run.

proposed_task.title: Unblock BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX after q-20260414-001 answered

insights.message: Save schema _validate() is out of sync with _get_default_profile() — fins_vues and echo_memory not in required_keys
insights.details: SPECIALIST-9 audit: _validate() checks 12 required keys but _get_default_profile() has 17 top-level fields. Fields added in recent cycles (fins_vues, echo_memory, run_history, whispers_seen) are not validated. Recommend: update required_keys every time a semantically important field is added to _get_default_profile().

proposed_task.title: Add fins_vues + echo_memory to _validate() required_keys

insights.message: run['anam'] is a write-only vestigial field — never consumed by rewards pipeline
insights.details: PAT-045 finding: _apply_add_anam() writes to run['anam'] (tracking in-run ADD_ANAM gains) but calculate_run_rewards() and apply_run_rewards() never read this field. The rewards pipeline computes anam from scratch (ANAM_BASE_REWARD + bonuses). This means run.anam tracks something useful (cumulative ADD_ANAM during run) but the data goes nowhere. When q-20260414-001 resolves, this field should either become 'anam_accumulated' (if option B/C chosen) or be removed entirely (if option A chosen — immediate gain is already applied to meta.anam). The current dual-write pattern (run.anam + meta.anam simultaneously) is redundant.

insights.message: Documentation lag: 3 docs/*.md files still reference deleted mg_meditation (and potentially other deleted systems)
insights.details: T-S3-MEDITATION-VERIFY found that docs/GAME_BEHAVIOR.md, docs/20_card_system/DOC_MINIGAMES.md, and docs/GAME_ENCYCLOPEDIA.md still document mg_meditation as an active minigame. With 18+ cleanup cycles, similar doc lag likely exists for other deleted systems (Triade, Souffle, 4 Jauges, etc). A docs-audit cycle could clean all doc references to deleted systems in one pass — improves onboarding clarity for future contributors.

proposed_task.title: Docs audit: remove all references to deleted systems (Triade, Souffle, mg_meditation, etc.)

insights.message: merlin_ai.gd + merlin_omniscient.gd are 5000+ lines combined — technical debt accumulation risk
insights.details: SPECIALIST-10 audit found merlin_omniscient.gd at 2951 lines and merlin_ai.gd at 2235 lines (combined 5186 lines). 7 PERF tasks (P24-P29) propose incremental splits. Prioritize PERF-REDUCE-MEGAFUNC (P24) and PERF-AI-PROCESS-EXTRACT (P27) as quick wins in S3.

proposed_task.title: S4 module split: omniscient_card_gen + omniscient_guardrails + omniscient_arc
